creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Ian Lepore from comment #7)
I'm fine not gating the LED patch on fixing the fdt search issue though, it's already broken and IMO we're still in a better place if the LEDs start working in the most common FreeBSD LAN78xx deployment (the single soldered-on USB-Ethernet on the RPi3B+) and don't break the currently working case of external USB adapters plugged into an x86 system.
